arts.ttl: Serie A | Udinese v Venezia: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Stadio Friuli is set to host a crucial Serie A encounter this Saturday as Udinese welcome Venezia in a match that could have significant implications for both teams' seasons. Udinese, currently languishing in the bottom half of the table, are desperate to halt their recent slide, while Venezia continue their fight against relegation. The post Serie A | Udinese v Venezia: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Wolves express interest in Udinese defender as they look set to miss out on Lens centre-back Kevin Danso
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Wolves made two bids for Danso but were unable to agree a fee with Lens for the 26-year-old. The Ligue 1 side are demanding a fee of £26m for Danso, who is also wanted by Rennes.

arts.ttl: Preview: Udinese vs. Venezia - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Serie A clash between Udinese and Venezia, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
